name: CardVille 1.0.49 PremiumAAA selected asset polish
notes: Premium lobby images are included in the patch surface, loaded with BASE_URL and CARDVILLE_ASSET_VERSION cache busting, and all GameButton CTAs use the premium vector style by default.
label: Visible village assets + premium buttons
description: Prevents blank village art after patch-only application and replaces old baked button skins with the start-screen style CTA system.
